close_reason: Verified with examples/python-hello-deps - imports six successfully
description:
Verify pydeps-gen works end-to-end:
1. Create a test pyproject.toml or requirements.txt with 'six' dependency
2. Run pydeps-gen to generate python-deps.toml
3. Verify python-deps-cell.nix builds correctly
4. Verify buck2 build //examples/python-hello-deps works
5. Verify the example runs and imports six correctly

The example already exists at examples/python-hello-deps/
title: Test pydeps-gen with python-hello-deps example
